strengths: 100% test ID coverage - every test has traceable ID (P0-E2E-001, P0-API-001, etc.)
100% priority marker coverage - all tests clearly marked P0 or P1
100% BDD format - all tests have Given-When-Then in JSDoc comments
Clear test structure with describe blocks grouping related tests
Excellent documentation - each test has clear purpose in comments
Consistent naming conventions across all test files
summary: Excellent maintainability with perfect test ID and priority coverage. Minor improvements needed for helper usage consistency.
